Compliance.description: Major SA retailer; registered PTY; no major NCC/FSCA issues found; minor ARB/ASA non-compliance; CPA/ECT Act compliant for consumer rights.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Mixed: strong app 4.7/5 but Trustpilot 1.4/5 (2500+ reviews) and HelloPeter 2.55/5; positive on delivery, complaints on orders/refunds.

Product Value.description: Widest SA range 5M+ products, competitive pricing, frequent sales; value consistent when orders correct.

Innovation.description: AI recommendations, dynamic pricing, 1-hr grocery Takealotnow, iOS/Android apps, seller platform, 3PL logistics.

Customer Support.description: Email/chat channels; app live support; poor HelloPeter/Trustpilot resolution; complex return processes frustrate.

Accessibility & Security.description: App with data collection for personalization; assumes POPIA compliance as major listed entity. Secure payment (credit card, EFT, on-account). No major data breaches reported.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Electronics from R500; clothing from R50; delivery R99/free over R450

socialSentiment.summary: App highly rated but Trustpilot/HelloPeter low on fraud/returns; social media mixed; positive delivery praises.
